PR #613 — Dashboard UI Fix

Hook Diagnostics text wrapping + external volume path validation

Bug 1 UI

Hook Diagnostics card text wraps vertically, character-by-character. The lg:flex-row layout triggers inside a 320px aside column, squeezing the text container.

Bug 2 Backend

Discovered projects on external volumes (/Volumes/) get 403 "Path is not allowed" because isActionPathAllowed() doesn't decode discovered project paths.

Fix Applied

Removed lg:flex-row breakpoint (always stack vertically). Added base64url path decoding for discovered project IDs in path validation.

All captures use the same dashboard instance, dark theme, same user context.

1. Hook Diagnostics Card — Text Wrapping

Before
<!-- system-hook-diagnostics-card.tsx:120 --> <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between"> /* Layout on xl+ screens (320px aside): */ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ 320px aside │ │ ┌─────────┐ ┌─────────────────────────┐│ │ │H │ │ Global hooks ▾ Refresh ││ │ │O │ │ ││ │ │O │ └─────────────────────────┘│ │ │K │ │ │ │...~100px │ │ │ └─────────┘ │ └─────────────────────────────────────────┘ lg:flex-row active inside 320px column! Text squeezed → wraps character-by-character

Before: lg:flex-row forces side-by-side layout inside 320px, leaving ~100px for text. Description and paths wrap vertically.

After
<!-- system-hook-diagnostics-card.tsx:120 --> <div className="flex flex-col gap-3"> /* Layout on xl+ screens (320px aside): */ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ 320px aside │ │ ┌───────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │HOOK DIAGNOSTICS │ │ │Inspect recent hook activity and │ │ │failures without opening JSONL files. │ │ │~/.claude/hooks/.logs/hook-log-... │ │ └───────────────────────────────────────┘ │ ┌───────────────────────────────────────┐ │ │ Global hooks ▾ Refresh │ │ └───────────────────────────────────────┘ └─────────────────────────────────────────┘ Always flex-col → text gets full 320px width

After: Always vertical stack. Title, description, and path get the full 320px width. Dropdown below.

2. External Volume Path Validation

Before
// action-routes.ts:778-795 async function isActionPathAllowed(dirPath, projectId) { if (projectId && !projectId.startsWith("discovered-")) { // registered project → exact match ✓ } // discovered-* projects fall through here // ↓ Only checks registered projects (not discovered) const registeredProjects = await listProjects(); if (registeredProjects.some(p => p.path === dirPath)) ✓ if (isPathInsideBase(dirPath, process.cwd())) ✓ return isPathInsideBase(dirPath, homedir()); // /Volumes/T9/ is NOT inside /Users/kai/ // → returns false → 403 "Path not allowed" }

Before: Discovered projects skip the first check, then fail all fallback checks for external volumes outside homedir().

After
// action-routes.ts:778-804 async function isActionPathAllowed(dirPath, projectId) { if (projectId && !projectId.startsWith("discovered-")) { // registered project → exact match ✓ } // Discovered projects: decode base64url path from ID if (projectId?.startsWith("discovered-")) { const encoded = projectId.slice("discovered-".length); const discoveredPath = Buffer.from(encoded, "base64url"); if (resolve(discoveredPath) === dirPath) return true; // /Volumes/T9/Projects/ndcc matches → ✓ allowed } const registeredProjects = await listProjects(); if (registeredProjects.some(p => p.path === dirPath)) ✓ if (isPathInsideBase(dirPath, process.cwd())) ✓ return isPathInsideBase(dirPath, homedir()); }

After: Decodes the base64url-encoded path from the discovered project ID and verifies it matches the requested path. External volumes now work.

What Changed

FileChangeLines
src/ui/src/components/system-hook-diagnostics-card.tsx Remove lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between +1 -1
src/domains/web-server/routes/action-routes.ts Add discovered project base64url path decode + verify +12 -0

Validation

  • [OK] bun run validate — typecheck, lint, 3827 tests pass, build OK
  • [OK] Both commits pass pre-commit quality gate hooks
  • [OK] Code change is minimal and targeted
  • [OK] No breaking changes to existing APIs
  • [OK] Discovered project path decode matches project-routes.ts pattern (line 243-246)
